components.title: Engine Runtime
components.summary: The local engine can evaluate runtime diagnostics.

components.title: Database
components.summary: PostgreSQL and pgvector are ready on the project-owned Unix socket.

components.title: Artifact Store
components.summary: The immutable runtime integrity sentinel verifies successfully.

components.title: Offline Policy
components.summary: Remote network access is denied and local boundaries are exact.

components.title: Trace Store
components.summary: Metadata-only traces use owner-private local storage.

components.title: Resource Policy
components.summary: Current memory, swap, and thermal state admit bounded local work.

components.title: Model Registry
components.summary: No production-qualified local model or provider is active.
components.remediation: Select and admit a provider only after governed evaluation and owner approval.

components.title: Contract API
components.summary: The versioned local status contract is available.
